hole_ref: c6/c7 H5 — Devil's Sea latitude cherry-pick
summary: PATCH-323-A in EXP-323 (verification batch 7): WIN-028 detail_evidence — adds folklore-range disclosure (25-35°N, Berlitz 1974 centroid ~30°N) and explicit concession that 25°N is the southern-edge choice most favourable to the dome's same-latitude framing; notes the longitude argument is invariant across the band. Mechanical string_replace, no verdict change.
